name: zlg-power
tagline: High-Reliability Power Module Solutions for Industrial Applications
description: ZLG Power is a leading manufacturer of high-reliability power modules including DC-DC converters, AC-DC power supplies, isolated power modules, and non-isolated POL converters. With over 20 years of experience in power electronics, ZLG Power serves industrial automation, telecommunications, medical equipment, and new energy vehicle markets with products known for high efficiency, compact size, and long-term reliability.
longDescription: ZLG Power specializes in the design and manufacture of high-quality power conversion products for demanding industrial applications. Their comprehensive product portfolio includes isolated DC-DC converters with wide input voltage ranges, high-efficiency AC-DC power supplies, compact POL (Point-of-Load) converters, and custom power solutions. ZLG Power products are characterized by high reliability, excellent thermal performance, and comprehensive protection features including overcurrent, overvoltage, and overtemperature protection. All products undergo rigorous testing and quality control to ensure consistent performance in harsh industrial environments. As an authorized distributor, LiTong Electronics provides full technical support, application assistance, and competitive pricing for ZLG Power products.

coreProducts.name: Isolated DC-DC Converters
coreProducts.description: Wide input range isolated DC-DC power modules for industrial applications

coreProducts.name: AC-DC Power Supplies
coreProducts.description: High-efficiency AC-DC power supplies with universal input

coreProducts.name: Non-isolated POL Converters
coreProducts.description: Compact point-of-load DC-DC converters for board-level power

coreProducts.name: Custom Power Solutions
coreProducts.description: Customized power modules designed for specific application requirements

features: Comprehensive protection features (OCP, OVP, OTP, SCP)

faqs.question: Is LiTong an authorized distributor of ZLG Power products?
faqs.answer: Yes, LiTong Electronics is an authorized distributor of ZLG Power products. We maintain direct relationships with ZLG Power and receive products through official channels, ensuring 100% genuine products with full manufacturer warranty and technical support.
faqs.decisionGuide: When purchasing ZLG Power products, always verify you are buying from an authorized distributor like LiTong to ensure product authenticity and warranty coverage.

faqs.question: What is the typical lead time for ZLG Power products?
faqs.answer: Standard lead time for ZLG Power products is 4-6 weeks for most models. Popular series like E_UHB and B_S-1W are often stocked for immediate delivery. For high-volume orders or custom configurations, lead times may extend to 8-10 weeks. Contact our sales team for current stock availability and expedited delivery options.
faqs.decisionGuide: For urgent projects, check our stock list for immediately available standard models, or contact us to discuss expedited delivery options.

faqs.question: Does ZLG Power offer custom power module design services?
faqs.answer: Yes, ZLG Power offers comprehensive custom power design services for applications with specific requirements not met by standard products. Custom services include modified electrical specifications, special form factors, enhanced environmental ratings, and custom pin configurations. Minimum order quantities apply for custom designs, typically starting at 1,000 units. LiTong FAEs can facilitate the custom design process and provide technical specifications.
faqs.decisionGuide: If your application requires specifications outside standard product ranges, contact our FAE team to discuss custom design possibilities and minimum order requirements.

faqs.question: What protection features are included in ZLG Power modules?
faqs.answer: ZLG Power modules include comprehensive protection features: Overcurrent Protection (OCP) prevents damage from output short circuits; Overvoltage Protection (OVP) protects loads from excessive output voltage; Overtemperature Protection (OTP) shuts down the module if internal temperature exceeds safe limits; Short Circuit Protection (SCP) provides continuous protection against output shorts; Input Undervoltage Lockout (UVLO) prevents operation with insufficient input voltage. These protections ensure safe, reliable operation in demanding applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: When selecting power modules, ensure the protection features match your application's safety requirements. ZLG Power modules provide comprehensive protection suitable for most industrial applications.

faqs.question: What is the operating temperature range for ZLG Power modules?
faqs.answer: Most ZLG Power modules operate over an industrial temperature range of -40C to +85C without derating. Some high-reliability series support extended temperature ranges up to +105C with appropriate derating. The wide temperature range makes ZLG Power modules suitable for harsh industrial environments, outdoor installations, and applications with limited thermal management. Always consult the datasheet for specific temperature derating curves.
faqs.decisionGuide: For applications in extreme temperature environments, select modules with appropriate temperature ratings and consider thermal derating requirements.

faqs.question: How do I select the right ZLG Power module for my application?
faqs.answer: Selecting the right ZLG Power module involves several key parameters: Input voltage range - ensure the module accepts your input voltage (e.g., 4.5-5.5V for 5V input, 9-36V for 24V systems); Output voltage and current - select a module that provides required output with at least 20% margin; Isolation requirements - choose isolated modules for safety-critical applications, non-isolated for board-level power; Package type - SIP for through-hole, SMD for surface mount, DIP for easy prototyping; Efficiency - higher efficiency reduces heat generation and improves reliability. LiTong FAEs provide free power module selection assistance.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team with your input/output requirements, isolation needs, and mechanical constraints for personalized module recommendations.

faqs.question: What is the MTBF and expected lifetime of ZLG Power modules?
faqs.answer: ZLG Power modules are designed for high reliability with MTBF (Mean Time Between Failures) ratings exceeding 1,000,000 hours at 25C ambient temperature, calculated per Telcordia SR-332 or MIL-HDBK-217F standards. Expected operational lifetime is typically 10-15 years under normal operating conditions. Reliability is ensured through rigorous component selection, thermal design optimization, and comprehensive burn-in testing. For mission-critical applications, enhanced screening and extended warranty options are available.
faqs.decisionGuide: For high-reliability applications, select modules with appropriate MTBF ratings and consider extended warranty and screening options.

faqs.question: Does ZLG Power provide technical support and application notes?
faqs.answer: Yes, ZLG Power provides comprehensive technical documentation including datasheets, application notes, reference designs, and thermal design guidelines. LiTong Electronics, as an authorized distributor, offers additional technical support through our FAE (Field Application Engineer) team. We provide application schematics review, PCB layout recommendations, thermal analysis assistance, and troubleshooting support. Contact our technical support team for assistance with ZLG Power product implementation.
faqs.decisionGuide: Take advantage of LiTong's FAE support for application design assistance, schematic review, and troubleshooting.
